sectiondef.header: Device registers

detaileddescription.para: Device Identity CAR

briefdescription.para: Command and Status Register Space 0x040-0xFC Registers.

detaileddescription.para: PE Logical layer Control CSR

briefdescription.para: Local Configuration Space 0 Base Address CSR.
Local Configuration Space 1 Base Address CSR.
Host Base Device ID Lock CSR.

detaileddescription.para: Extended features LP Serial Register Block Header

briefdescription.para: Port n Link Maintenance Request CSR.
Port n Local Ack ID CSR.
Port n Error and Status CSR.

detaileddescription.para: Water Mark CSR

sectiondef.header: Device Identity CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_DEV_ID_CAR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Device Information CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_DEV_INFO_CAR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Assembly Identity CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_ASM_ID_CAR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Assembly Device Information CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_ASM_INFO_CAR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Processing Element Features CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PEF_CAR_OFFSET register.

briefdescription.para: Common Transport Large System support Mask.

sectiondef.header: Source Operations CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_SRC_OPS_CAR_OFFSET register and XSRIO_DST_OPS_CAR register.

sectiondef.header: PE Logical layer Control CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PELL_CTRL_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Local Configuration Space Base Address 1 CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_LCS1_BASEADDR_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Base Device ID CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_BASE_DID_CSR_OFFSET register.

briefdescription.para: Large Base Device ID Mask(16-bit device ID)
Base Device ID Mask(8-bit device ID)

sectiondef.header: Host Base Device ID CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_HOST_DID_LOCK_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: LP - Serial Register Block header bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_EFB_HEADER_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port Link timeout value CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_LINK_TOUT_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port response timeout value CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_RESP_TOUT_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port General Control CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_GEN_CTL_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port n maintenance request CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_MNT_REQ_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port n maintenance response CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_MNT_RES_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port n local ack ID CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_ACKID_CSR_OFFSET register.

briefdescription.para: Out bound ACK ID Reset Mask.
In bound ACK ID Reset Mask.

sectiondef.header: Port n Error and Status CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_ERR_STS_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port n Control CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_CTL_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: LP -Serial Lane Register Block Header bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_SL_HEADER_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: LP -Seral Lane n Status 0 CSRS bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_SLS0_CSR(x) register.

sectiondef.header: LP -Seral Lane n Status 1 CSRS bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_SLS1_CSR(x) register.

briefdescription.para: Connected port transmit Emphasis Tap(+1) Status Mask.
Connected port transmit Emphasis Tap(-1) Status Mask.
Connected port lane Receiver trained Mask.

sectiondef.header: Water Mark CSRS bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_IMP_WCSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Buffer Control CSRS bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_IMP_BCSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Maintenance Request Information Register bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_IMP_MRIR_OFFSET register.

briefdescription.para: This typedef contains the configuration information for the device.

detaileddescription.para: An instance must be allocated for each SRIO device in use.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the XSrio instance provided by the caller based on the given Config structure.

detaileddescription.para: Initialization and Control functions in xsrio.c.

parameterdescription.para: is the XSrio instance to operate on.
is the device configuration structure containing information about a specific SRIO Device.
is the Physical address of the hardware in a Virtual Memory operating system environment.It is the Base Address in a stand alone environment.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS Initialization was successful.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPortStatus will check the status of the port and returns the status of the port to the user.

parameterdescription.para: is the XSrio instance to operate on.

listitem.para: XSRIO_PORT_OK Port is initialized with no errors.
XSRIO_PORT_UNINITIALIZED Port is not initialized. No Serial Rapidio link is present.
XSRIO_PORT_HAS_ERRORS Port is initialized but has errors.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPEType API will check for the Processing Element type and return the type of type of Processing Element.

parameterdescription.para: is the XSrio instance to operate on.

listitem.para:
XSRIO_IS_MEMORY if the core is configured as a memory
XSRIO_IS_PROCESSOR if the core is configured as a processor
XSRIO_IS_BRIDGE if the core is configured as a bridge.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsOperationSupported tells whether the operation is supported by the SRIO Gen2 core or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
type is the operation type of the SRIO Packet
type

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS if the operation is supported by the core.
XST_FAILURE if the operation is not supported by the core.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 WaterMark0, u8 WaterMark1, u8 WaterMark2)
memberdef.name: XSrio_SetWaterMark

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetWaterMark Configures the watermark to transfer a priority packet.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the water mark value to transfer a priority 0 packet.
is the water mark value to transfer a priority 1 packet.
is the water mark value to transfer a priority 2 packet.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetWaterMark API reads the water mark values.

parameterdescription.para: is the XSrio instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the water mark 0 value.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the water mark 1 value.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the water mark 2 value.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table XSrio_ConfigTable contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device to lookup for

simplesect.para: The configuration structure for the device. If the device ID is not found,a NULL pointer is returned.

briefdescription.para: Core has physically addressable storage space.
Core has a local processor that runs code.
Core can be used as a bridge to another interface.
Core supports write with Response operation.
XSrio_ReadDeviceVendorID returns the Device Vendor Id of the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Device Vendor ID of the core.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ReadDeviceID returns the Device Id of the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ReadAsmVendorID returns the Assembly Vendor Id of the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Assembly Vendor ID of the core.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ReadAsmID returns the Assembly Id of the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetExFeaturesPointer gives the pointer to the Phy Register space of the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the Phy Register space of the core.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ReadAsmRevision returns the Assembly Revision value of the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsLargeSystem checks whether PE(Processing Element) supports a large system (16-bit Device ids)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE If the System Supports 16-bit Devices.
FALSE If the System Supports 8-bit Devices.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsCRFSupported checks whether the PE(Processing Element) supports CRF(Critical Request Flow indicator).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE If the System Supports CRF.
FALSE If the System Won't Support CRF.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ReadSrcOps returns the Source Operations CAR Register contents.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Contents of the Source Operations CAR Register.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ReadDstOps returns the Destination Operations CAR Register contents.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Contents of the Destination Operations CAR Register.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetLCSBA returns the Local Configuration Space Base Address(LCSBA) of the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Contents of Local Configuration Space Base Address Register.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetLCSBA Configures the Local Configuration Space Base Address of the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Local Configuration Space Base Address that needs to be configured.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetLCSBA(XSrio *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetLargeBaseDeviceID returns the 16-bit Device Id for an endpoint in a Large transport system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetLargeBaseDeviceID configures the 16-bit Device Id for an endpoint in a Large transport system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Device ID that needs to be configured.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetLargeBaseDeviceID(XSrio *InstancePtr, u16 DeviceId)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetBaseDeviceID returns the 8-bit Device Id for an endpoint in a small Transport system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetBaseDeviceID configures the 8-bit Device Id for an endpoint in a small transport system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Device ID that needs to be configured.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetBaseDeviceID(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 DeviceId)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetHostBaseDevID_LockCSR returns the Device Id of the system host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Device Id of the system host.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetHostBaseDevID_LockCSR configures the Host Base Device Id of the SRIO gen2 Core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Device ID that needs to be configured.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetHostBaseDevID_LockCSR(XSrio *InstancePtr, u16 DeviceId)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetComponentTagCSR returns the Component Tag Value set by the software during initialization.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetComponentTagCSR sets the Component Tag Value for SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Component Tag Value to be set.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetComponentTagCSR(XSrio *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetExtFeaturesID returns the Extended Features Id value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetSerialExtFeaturesPointer returns the Extended Features Pointer which will point to the next extended features block if one exists.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPortLinkTimeOutValue returns the Port Link Timeout value for the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetPortLinkTimeOutValue sets the Port Link Timeout value for the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Port Link Timeout value to be set.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetPortLinkTimeOutValue(XSrio *InstancePtr, u16 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPortRespTimeOutValue returns the Port Response Timeout value for the the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetPortRespTimeOutValue sets the Port Response Timeout value for the The SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Port Response Timeout to be set.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetPortRespTimeOutValue(XSrio *InstancePtr, u16 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsPEDiscovered checks whether the PE(Processing Element) is discovered or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE If the PE is Discovered.
FALSE If the PE is not Discovered.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetDiscovered configures the device as Discovered so that it is responsible for system exploration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsMasterEnabled checks whether PE(Processing Element) is allowed to issue request into the system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE If the Master Enable bit is set.
FALSE If the Master Enable bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetMasterEnabled configures the device so that it is allowed to issue requests into the system.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsHost checks whether PE(Processing Element) is responsible for system exploration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE If the Host bit is set.
FALSE If the Host bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetHostEnabled configures the device to be responsible for system exploration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetCommand returns the command value that is sent on the Link-request Control symbol of the SRIO Gen2 core.

detaileddescription.para: This api is available only if the software assisted error recovery option is enabled in the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Command information of the link-request control symbol.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SendCommand sends the given command in the link-request control symbol of the SRIO Gen2 core.

detaileddescription.para: This api is available only if the software assisted error recovery option is selected in the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Command to be send.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SendCommand(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsResponseValid checks whether the link response is valid or not in the SRIO Gen2 Core.

detaileddescription.para: This api is available only if the software assisted error recovery option is enabled in the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE if the corresponding link request causes a link response.
FALSE if the corresponding link request not causes a link response.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetOutboundAckID returns the value of the next transmitted Ackid of the SRIO Gen2 Core.

detaileddescription.para: This api is available only if the software assisted error recovery option is selected core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetOutboundAckID sets value of the next transmitted Ackid of the SRIO Gen2 Core.

detaileddescription.para: This api is available only if the software assisted error Recovery option is selected in the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Outbound Ack Id to be set.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetOutboundAckID(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetInboundAckID returns the expected Ackid of the next received packet of the SRIO Gen2 core.

detaileddescription.para: This api is available only if the software assisted error recovery option is selected in the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetInboundAckID sets the value of the next transmitted Ackid of the SRIO Gen2 core.

detaileddescription.para: This api is available only if the software assisted error recovery option is selected in the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the InBound Ack Id to be set.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetInboundAckID(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 Value) This api won't work if you call the XSrio_ClrOutStandingAckIDs before calling this api.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ClrOutStandingAckIDs clears all outstanding unacknowledged received packets of the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsEnumerationBoundary checks whether the enumeration boundary is available or not for the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE if the EnumerationBoundary Enabled.
FALSE if the EnumerationBoundary is not Enabled.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ClrEnumerationBoundary clears the enumeration boundary of the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPortwidthOverride returns the port width override value of the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetPortwidthOverride configures the port width override value of the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the port width override value needs to be set.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetPortwidthOverride(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetSerialLaneExtFeaturesPointer returns the extended features pointer For the serial lane which will point to the next extended features block If one exists.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ClrDecodingErrors clears the 8B/10B decoding errors and return Result.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Serial Lane-number(0,1,2,3).

simplesect.para: C-style signature: int XSrio_ClrDecodingErrors(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 Lanenum)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetRxSize returns the number of maximum-size packets the rx buffer holded.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ForceRxFlowControl forces the Tx flow control enabled core to use Rx flow control.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetTxSize returns the number of maximum-size packets the tx buffer holds.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_CheckforTxReqreorder checks whether the transmit buffer has been configured to allow reordering of requests.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE If the Tx Request reorder is enabled in the core.
FALSE If the Tx Request reorder is not enabled in the core.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsTxFlowControl checks whether the BUF is currently operating in Tx flow control mode or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE If the Tx Flow Control is enabled in the core.
FALSE If the Tx Flow Control is not enabled in the core.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetDestinationID gets the destination id value which will be used for outgoing maintenance requests.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Destination ID value of the outgoing maintenance request.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetDestinationID sets Device Id which will be used for Outgoing maintenance requests.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Device Id value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetDestinationID(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetCRF checks whether the CRF is enabled in the core or not which will be used for outgoing maintenance requests.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: CRF Value used for outgoing maintenance requests.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetCRF sets CRF value that is used for outgoing maintenance requests.

detaileddescription.para: This api will work only when the CRF support is enabled in the core

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPriority priority used for outgoing maintenance requests.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetPriority sets the Priority which will be used for outgoing maintenance requests.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the Priority value which will used for outgoing maintenance requests.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetPriority(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_RequestTID gives the transfer id value which will be used for the next outgoing maintenance request.

detaileddescription.para: This value will increment after each request is sent.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetTID sets the transfer id which will be used for the next outgoing maintenance request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the transfer id value which of the next outgoing maintenance request.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetTID(XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 Value)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_ClrPortError clears the Port Error specified by the Mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the mask for the Port Error to be cleared.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_ClrPortError(XSrio *InstancePtrm, u32 Mask)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPortErrorStatus returns the mask for the port errors currently enabled in the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: The bit mask for the port errors that are currently enabled.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetPortControlStatus Configures specific port specified by the Mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the mask for the port that needs to be enabled.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSrio_SetPortControlStatus(XSrio *InstancePtrm, u32 Mask)

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPortControlStatus returns the status of the port that is currently enabled in the SRIO Gen2 core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: The bit mask for the ports that are currently enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the SRIO
is the register offset.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XSrio_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the SRIO.
is the register offset.
is the data to write.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSRIO_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This file contains the required functions for the XSrio driver.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains static Initialization functionality for Xilinx SRIO Gen2 Core driver.
This header file contains identifiers and macros that can be used to access the Axi srio gen2 device.
This file contains a configuration table that specifies the configuration of SRIO devices in the system.
See the xsrio.h header file for more details on this driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 adk 16/04/14 Initial release 1.1 sk 11/10/15 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for Baseaddress CR# 867425. Changed the prototype of XSrio_CfgInitialize API. 1.6 adk 06/02/24 Added support for system device-tree flow. 1.7 ml 18/07/25 Fix unused parameter GCC warning.

detaileddescription.para: Each SRIO device in the system should have an entry in the table.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 adk 16/04/14 Initial release

detaileddescription.para: The driver APIs/functions are defined in xsrio.h.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:
Ver Who Date Changes 1.0 adk 16/04/14 Initial release. 1.8 ml 03/02/26 Fix codespell warnings

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 adk 16/04/14 Initial release. 1.6 adk 06/02/24 Added support for system device-tree flow.
